storyboard.content: I have mild abdominal discomfort and bloating, especially after I eat
My stools have been looser than normal and I am going more often than usual
The symptoms get noticeably worse after I eat dairy products
This has been going on for about six weeks and has stayed about the same
The discomfort is mild and is not seriously getting in the way of my daily life
I have not seen any blood in my stool and I have no fever or vomiting
I am a 29-year-old woman with no significant medical history
